bugs.error_message: IllegalStateException: Cannot locate the plugin code source to extract the sidecar bundle
bugs.root_cause: protectionDomain.codeSource is null in Gradle runIde dev sandbox — IntelliJ plugin classloader does not expose a code source
bugs.fix: Locate bundle via getResource("/sidecar/main.js") URL; handle "jar:" (production) and "file:" (dev sandbox) protocols

bugs.error_message: Coding Moments page: 'No Loadable Images Found' — 7 image moments detected but getSessionImages returned [] for every CLI/Claude session
bugs.root_cause: Two layered gaps: (1) extractSessionImages only parses the VS Code Copilot file format (kind:0/2 state log); Claude .jsonl stores images as message.content[] blocks {type:'image', source:{type:'base64',media_type,data}} keyed by the line uuid. (2) Deeper: external-harness sessions (Claude/Codex/OpenCode) are collected via parser-harnesses HarnessCollectionContext which only carries {workspaces, sessions} and never registers a SessionSource, so sessionSourceIndex.get(sessionId) misses for all Claude sessions and getSessionImages hit `if(!source) return {images:[]}`.
bugs.fix: Added extractCliSessionImages(filePath, requestId) in parser-claude.ts (matches line by uuid, converts base64 image-block sources to data: URIs, caps at 4). Stamped session.sourceFilePath in parseClaudeSessionFile (sessionId is NOT reliably the filename). getSessionImages now: dispatches sessionSourceIndex entries on kind, then falls back to session.sourceFilePath for harness==='Claude'. Bumped CACHE_VERSION 9->10 so persisted sessions re-parse with the new field. CSP already allows img-src data:.

bugs.root_cause: No early return/throw for edge case: upToDate

bugs.error_message: Sidecar-side changes (image fix, CACHE_VERSION bump) never reached the running IDE despite rebuilds; runtime/0.1.0/main.js stayed stale
bugs.root_cause: ensureExtracted (commit 3be5121) detected 'dev sandbox' via getResource('/sidecar/main.js').protocol=='file' and only then skipped the isComplete() short-circuit. But the IntelliJ runIde sandbox packages the plugin as plugin-0.1.0.jar, so the protocol is 'jar', inDevSandbox=false, isComplete(stale files)=true -> the first-ever extraction was reused forever. Version string (0.1.0) never changes between dev builds. Webview app.js was unaffected (served from JAR by AssetSchemeHandler, not extracted), which masked the bug — only sidecar main.js changes silently failed to load.
bugs.fix: Replaced the file://-vs-jar:// heuristic with a content fingerprint: hash the bundled /sidecar/main.js (SHA-256), store it as runtime/<ver>/.bundle-hash, and re-extract whenever the extraction is incomplete or the stored hash != current. Correct for dev (rebuilt bundle) and prod (plugin update) regardless of version-dir name. Verified: fresh runIde re-extracted main.js with the fix and cache re-parsed to version 10.
